name: MFR Mobile Field Report
description: Manage field service operations with Mobile Field Report (MFR). Access service requests, appointments, companies, contacts, technicians, service objects, products, documents, time tracking, invoices, checklists, items, tags, qualifications, cost centers, and reports via OData API.
instructions:
This connector uses the MFR OData v3 REST API. Key conventions:

**Date format**: Use `datetime'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ'` for all date filters (e.g. `DateModified gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'`).

**ID format**: Entity IDs are numeric. When used in URL paths, append an 'L' suffix (e.g. `/ServiceRequests(11164418048L)`). The tools handle this automatically.

**OData filtering**: All list endpoints support `$filter`, `$orderby`, `$top`, `$skip`, `$select`, and `$expand`. Combine filters with `and`/`or`. Operators: `eq`, `ne`, `gt`, `ge`, `lt`, `le`.

**Common entity states**:
- ServiceRequest: ReadyForScheduling, Scheduled, InProgress, Released, Closed
- Appointment: NotVisited, InProgress, IsWorkDone, Rejected
- Invoice: eIsDraft, eIsPaid, eIsSent, eIsOverdue

**Pagination**: Use `$top` (max 100) and `$skip` for pagination. Default is 20 results.

**Expanding relations**: Use `$expand` to include related entities in a single request (e.g. `$expand=Appointments,Customer,Tags`). This avoids N+1 queries.

**Workflow**: A typical field service flow is: Create ServiceRequest → Create Appointment(s) → Assign technician → Track time → Complete steps → Generate report → Create invoice.

tools.name: mfr_list_service_requests
tools.description: List service requests (work orders). Returns Id, Name, ExternalId, State, Type, Description, CustomerId, TargetTimeInMinutes, DueDateRangeStart/End, ClosedAt, ReleasedAt, WorkDoneAt, DateOfCreation, DateModified, CurrentOwnerId, CostCenterId, PortalLink, and IsTemplate. Supports OData $filter, $expand, $orderby, $top, $skip, and $select.

$top.description: Max number of results to return (default: 20, max: 100)

$skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination (e.g. 20 for page 2 with $top=20)

$filter.description: OData filter expression. Filterable fields: State (values: 'ReadyForScheduling', 'Scheduled', 'InProgress', 'Released', 'Closed'), Type ('IsServiceRequest'), ExternalId, Name, IsTemplate (true/false), DateModified, DateOfCreation, CustomerId, CurrentOwnerId, CostCenterId. Date format: datetime'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss'. Examples: "State eq 'InProgress'", "DateModified gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00'", "State eq 'Closed' and DateModified gt datetime'2025-07-12T13:15:58Z'", "IsTemplate eq true", "ExternalId eq 'T-5432'". Operators: eq, ne, gt, ge, lt, le, and, or, not.

$orderby.description: Sort results. Examples: 'DateModified desc', 'DateOfCreation asc', 'Name asc'

$expand.description: Expand related entities (comma-separated). Options: ServiceObjects, Customer, Reports, Items, Steps, Comments, Appointments, Appointments/Contacts, Tags, Qualifications

$select.description: Select specific fields to return (comma-separated). Example: 'Id,Name,State,DateModified'

tools.name: mfr_get_service_request
tools.description: Get a single service request by its numeric ID. Returns all fields including Id, Name, ExternalId, State, Type, Description, CustomerId, TargetTimeInMinutes, DueDateRangeStart/End, ClosedAt, ReleasedAt, WorkDoneAt, DateOfCreation, DateModified, CurrentOwnerId, CostCenterId, PortalLink, Location, CustomValues, Version, and IsTemplate.

requestId.description: The service request numeric ID (e.g. '11164418048'). Use the 'L' suffix in the URL path.

$expand.description: Expand related entities. Options: ServiceObjects, Customer, Reports, Items, Steps, Comments, Appointments, Appointments/Contacts, Tags, Qualifications

tools.name: mfr_get_service_request_by_external_id
tools.description: Find a service request by its external ID (your system's reference). Returns matching service requests.

externalId.description: The external ID to search for (e.g. 'T-5432')

$expand.description: Expand related entities. Options: ServiceObjects, Customer, Reports, Items, Steps, Comments, Appointments, Appointments/Contacts, Tags, Qualifications

tools.name: mfr_create_service_request
tools.description: Create a new service request (work order). Returns the created service request with its Id.

TargetTimeInMinutes.description: Estimated time to complete in minutes

CurrentOwnerId.description: Contact ID of the responsible technician

DueDateRangeStart.description: Start of due date range in ISO 8601 format

IsTemplate.description: Set to true to create a template instead of a regular request

CreateFromServiceRequestTemplateId.description: Create from an existing template by providing the template's ID

tools.name: mfr_update_service_request
tools.description: Update an existing service request. Only include fields you want to change.

tools.name: mfr_delete_service_request
tools.description: Delete a service request by its numeric ID. This action is irreversible.

requestId.description: The service request numeric ID to delete

tools.name: mfr_link_service_request_service_object
tools.description: Link a service object (equipment/device) to a service request.

serviceObjectId.description: The service object numeric ID to link

tools.name: mfr_link_service_request_document
tools.description: Link a document to a service request.

documentId.description: The document numeric ID to link

tools.name: mfr_add_tags_to_service_request
tools.description: Add a tag to a service request. The tag must already exist.

tagId.description: The tag numeric ID to add

tools.name: mfr_remove_tag_from_service_request
tools.description: Remove a tag from a service request.

tagId.description: The tag numeric ID to remove

tools.name: mfr_add_qualification_to_service_request
tools.description: Add a required qualification to a service request.

qualificationId.description: The qualification numeric ID to add

tools.name: mfr_remove_qualification_from_service_request
tools.description: Remove a qualification from a service request.

qualificationId.description: The qualification numeric ID to remove

tools.name: mfr_list_appointments
tools.description: List scheduled appointments for field technicians. Returns Id, State, Type/AppointmentType, StartDateTime, EndDateTime, ContactId, ContactIds, ServiceRequestId, Note, ExternalId, DrivingDistanceFrom/To, CreatedAt, and Version.

$top.description: Max number of results to return

$skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: State ('NotVisited', 'InProgress', 'IsWorkDone', 'Rejected'), Type/AppointmentType ('Standard', 'Vacation', 'Illness', 'Other', 'Task'), StartDateTime, EndDateTime, ContactId, ServiceRequestId. Examples: "State eq 'InProgress'", "StartDateTime ge datetime'2026-03-01T00:00:00' and StartDateTime le datetime'2026-03-31T23:59:59'", "ContactId eq '410583043'", "Type eq 'Vacation'"

$orderby.description: Sort results. Examples: 'StartDateTime asc', 'EndDateTime desc', 'CreatedAt desc'

tools.name: mfr_create_appointment
tools.description: Create a new appointment (standard, vacation, illness, or other).

ContactIds.description: Array of contact IDs for multiple assigned technicians (e.g. ['410583043', '1767604224'])

ServiceRequestId.description: Service request ID to link (use '0' for standalone appointments like vacation)

tools.name: mfr_update_appointment
tools.description: Update an existing appointment.

tools.name: mfr_delete_appointment
tools.description: Delete an appointment by its numeric ID.

appointmentId.description: The appointment numeric ID to delete

tools.name: mfr_list_companies
tools.description: List companies (customers/clients). Returns Id, Name, ExternalId, Location (Address, Postal, City, Country, Lat/Long), Note, BillingAddress, SupportTelephone, SupportFax, SupportMail, IsPhysicalPerson, IsSupplier, IsOwner, IsEmailInvoicingActive, MainContactId, MappingId, DateOfCreation, DateModified, CustomValues, and Version.

$top.description: Max number of results to return

$skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: Name, ExternalId, IsPhysicalPerson (true/false), IsSupplier (true/false), DateModified. Examples: "Name eq 'Mustermann GmbH'", "substringof('Muster', Name)", "IsSupplier eq true", "DateModified gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00'"

$expand.description: Expand related entities. Options: Contacts, Tags, ServiceObjects, MainContact

tools.name: mfr_get_company
tools.description: Get a single company by its numeric ID with all details.

$expand.description: Expand related entities. Options: Contacts, Tags, ServiceObjects, MainContact

tools.name: mfr_create_company
tools.description: Create a new company (customer/client).

IsPhysicalPerson.description: True if this is an individual person, false for a company (default: false)

IsSupplier.description: True if this company is a supplier (default: false)

Location.description: Address object with fields: AddressString (street), Postal (zip code), City, State, Country (ISO code e.g. 'DE', 'GB')

tools.name: mfr_update_company
tools.description: Update an existing company. Only include fields you want to change.

Location.description: Updated address: {AddressString, Postal, City, State, Country}

tools.name: mfr_delete_company
tools.description: Delete a company by its numeric ID.

companyId.description: The company numeric ID to delete

tools.name: mfr_list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts (people linked to companies). Returns Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, JobTitle, MobilePhone, Telephone, Fax, Note, Gender, CompanyId, IsUser, UserId, ExternalId, GroupId, DateModified, CustomValues, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: FirstName, LastName, Email, CompanyId, IsUser (true/false), Gender ('Male', 'Female'), ExternalId, DateModified. Examples: "CompanyId eq '6026428432'", "LastName eq 'Smith'", "IsUser eq true", "DateModified gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00'"

tools.name: mfr_get_contact
tools.description: Get a single contact by its numeric ID.

tools.name: mfr_create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact (person).

CompanyId.description: Company ID to link (use '0' for no company)

IsUser.description: Whether this contact is also a system user (default: false)

tools.name: mfr_update_contact
tools.description: Update an existing contact.

tools.name: mfr_list_service_objects
tools.description: List service objects (equipment, machines, devices). Returns Id, Name, ExternalId, Note, Location (Address, Postal, City, Country, Lat/Long), CompanyId, ParentServiceObjectId, IsWarehouse, IsProduct, ProductId, MappingId, QuickSearch, DateOfCreation, DateModified, CustomValues, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: Name, ExternalId, CompanyId (use Company/Id), IsWarehouse, IsProduct, DateModified. Examples: "Company/Id eq 10981310465L", "Name eq 'Generator A1'", "IsWarehouse eq true", "DateModified gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00'"

tools.name: mfr_get_service_object
tools.description: Get a single service object by its numeric ID.

tools.name: mfr_create_service_object
tools.description: Create a new service object (equipment/device).

CompanyId.description: Company ID that owns this object

ParentServiceObjectId.description: Parent object ID for hierarchy (use '0' for root)

ProductId.description: Product catalog ID to link (use '0' for none)

tools.name: mfr_update_service_object
tools.description: Update an existing service object.

tools.name: mfr_delete_service_object
tools.description: Delete a service object by its numeric ID.

serviceObjectId.description: The service object numeric ID to delete

tools.name: mfr_list_users
tools.description: List system users (technicians, dispatchers). Returns Id, UserName, IsActive, IsMobile, IsSystem, IsApproved, ContactId, PreferedLanguage, TimeZone, PreferedCulture, CreationDate, LastLoginDate, EmailChannelEnabled, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: UserName, IsActive (true/false), IsMobile (true/false), IsSystem (true/false), ContactId. Examples: "IsActive eq true", "IsMobile eq true", "UserName eq '1demo@simplias.com'"

tools.name: mfr_activate_deactivate_user
tools.description: Activate or deactivate a user account.

IsActive.description: Set to true to activate, false to deactivate

tools.name: mfr_list_products
tools.description: List products from the product catalog. Returns Id, Name, SubKey, Description, DateModified, MappingId, CustomValueStepTemplateId, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: Name, SubKey, DateModified. Examples: "Name eq 'Heat Pump X200'", "DateModified gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00'"

tools.name: mfr_get_product
tools.description: Get a single product by its numeric ID.

tools.name: mfr_create_product
tools.description: Create a new product in the product catalog.

tools.name: mfr_list_documents
tools.description: List documents (PDFs, images, attachments). Returns Id, FileName, URI (download link), ContentType, State, ExternalId, IsGlobal, IsLink, StartDateTime, EndDateTime, UploadDate, DateModified, ServiceRequestId, Note, HTMLCode, CustomValues, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: FileName, ContentType, IsGlobal, ExternalId, ServiceRequestId, DateModified. Examples: "ContentType eq 'application/pdf'", "IsGlobal eq true", "ServiceRequestId eq '11164418048'"

tools.name: mfr_get_document
tools.description: Get a single document by its numeric ID. The URI field contains the download link.

tools.name: mfr_update_document
tools.description: Update document metadata (not the file content).

IsGlobal.description: Set to true to make globally available

tools.name: mfr_delete_document
tools.description: Delete a document by its numeric ID.

documentId.description: The document numeric ID to delete

tools.name: mfr_list_time_events
tools.description: List time tracking events. Returns Id, TimeEventType, State, IsApproved, IsManual, StartDateTime, EndDateTime, ContactId, ServiceRequestId, Description, ExternalId, ProposedDrivingDistance, DateModified, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: TimeEventType ('eWorking', 'eDriving', 'ePause', 'eVacation', 'eIllness', 'eOther', 'eCustomTimeEvent'), StartDateTime, EndDateTime, ContactId (use Contact/Id), ServiceRequestId, IsApproved, DateModified. Examples: "StartDateTime gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00'", "Contact/Id eq 410583043L", "TimeEventType eq 'eWorking'", "IsApproved eq true"

tools.name: mfr_get_time_events_for_service_request
tools.description: Get all time events linked to a specific service request.

tools.name: mfr_create_time_event
tools.description: Create a time tracking event for a service request or standalone (vacation, illness, etc.).

TimeEventType.description: Type of time event. Values: 'eWorking' (on-site work), 'eDriving' (travel), 'ePause' (break), 'eVacation', 'eIllness', 'eOther', 'eCustomTimeEvent'

ServiceRequestId.description: Linked service request ID (use '0' for standalone events like vacation)

IsApproved.description: Whether this time event is pre-approved (default: false)

tools.name: mfr_list_steps
tools.description: List checklist steps for a service request. Returns Id, Name, Type, IsDone, IsVisible, HasError, SortOrder, Data (JSON with field definitions), Description, Comment, InternalComment, ServiceObjectId, StepListTemplateId, ParentId, TrackingId, and Version.

tools.name: mfr_get_step
tools.description: Get a single step by its numeric ID, with attachments.

tools.name: mfr_create_step
tools.description: Create a new checklist step in a service request or step list template.

Type.description: Step type. Values: 'EnterValue' (data entry fields), 'Choice' (selection), 'Picture' (photo capture), 'SignDocument' (signature), 'Material' (material tracking), 'Group' (group container for sub-steps)

ServiceRequestId.description: Service request ID (for request checklist steps)

ParentId.description: Parent step ID for nested steps within a Group (use '0' for root level)

Data.description: JSON string defining step fields. For EnterValue: {"fields": [{"isRequired": true, "name": "Field name", "type": "text|choice|float", "enumeration": "Opt1;Opt2", "unit": "kg"}]}

tools.name: mfr_update_step
tools.description: Update a checklist step (e.g. mark as done, add comment).

IsDone.description: Mark step as completed (true) or incomplete (false)

HasError.description: Flag step as having an error

tools.name: mfr_delete_step
tools.description: Delete a checklist step by its numeric ID.

stepId.description: The step numeric ID to delete

tools.name: mfr_list_item_types
tools.description: List item types (material/service catalog). Returns Id, NameOrNumber, ExternalId, Type, Description, Manufacture, Price, Costs, VAT, Discount, ListPrice, GlobalTradeItemNr, IsPortalOnly, IsDiscontinued, IsWarehouse, UnitId, UnitString, DateModified, CustomValues, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: NameOrNumber, ExternalId, Type ('Material', 'QuickFilter'), IsDiscontinued, DateModified. Examples: "Type eq 'Material'", "substringof('Pump', NameOrNumber)"

tools.name: mfr_get_item_type
tools.description: Get a single item type by its numeric ID.

tools.name: mfr_create_item_type
tools.description: Create a new item type in the material/service catalog.

UnitId.description: Unit ID from ItemUnits (use '0' for default)

tools.name: mfr_update_item_type
tools.description: Update an existing item type.

tools.name: mfr_delete_item_type
tools.description: Delete an item type by its numeric ID.

tools.name: mfr_list_items_in_service_request
tools.description: List items (materials/services used) in a specific service request.

tools.name: mfr_create_item
tools.description: Create an item (material/service entry) in a service request.

ItemTypeId.description: Item type ID from catalog (use '0' for ad-hoc)

ServiceObjectId.description: Linked service object ID (use '0' for none)

tools.name: mfr_update_item
tools.description: Update an item in a service request.

tools.name: mfr_delete_item
tools.description: Delete an item from a service request.

tools.name: mfr_list_item_units
tools.description: List available item units (pcs, kg, m, h, etc.).

tools.name: mfr_create_item_unit
tools.description: Create a new item unit.

tools.name: mfr_list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices. Returns Id, InvoiceId (number), InvoiceState, URI (download link), DocumentName, InvoiceBalance, InvoiceBalanceNetto, WageBalanceNet, InvoiceDate, DueDate, DatePayed, PerformanceDate, DateOfCreation, WithoutVAT, Skonto, PartialPayment, Note, FileType, ReportDefinitionCode, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Filterable fields: InvoiceState ('eIsDraft', 'eIsPaid', 'eIsSent', 'eIsOverdue'), InvoiceDate, DueDate, DatePayed, InvoiceBalance. Examples: "InvoiceState eq 'eIsPaid'", "InvoiceDate gt datetime'2025-01-01T00:00:00'", "InvoiceBalance gt 1000"

tools.name: mfr_list_tags
tools.description: List tags. Returns Id, Name, GrpName, ColorDefinition, Type ('ServiceRequest'), IsHidden, and Version.

tools.name: mfr_create_tag
tools.description: Create a new tag.

tools.name: mfr_list_qualifications
tools.description: List technician qualifications. Returns Id, Name, and Version.

tools.name: mfr_create_qualification
tools.description: Create a new technician qualification.

tools.name: mfr_update_qualification
tools.description: Update a qualification.

tools.name: mfr_delete_qualification
tools.description: Delete a qualification by its numeric ID.

tools.name: mfr_list_cost_centers
tools.description: List cost centers. Returns Id, Name, and Version.

tools.name: mfr_create_cost_center
tools.description: Create a new cost center.

tools.name: mfr_list_step_list_templates
tools.description: List step list templates (reusable checklists). Returns Id, Name, MappingId, IsReleased, IsDurable, DateModified, and Version.

$filter.description: OData filter. Examples: "IsReleased eq true", "Name eq 'Safety Check'"

tools.name: mfr_get_step_list_template
tools.description: Get a single step list template by its numeric ID.

tools.name: mfr_create_step_list_template
tools.description: Create a new reusable step list template (checklist).

IsReleased.description: Whether the template is released for use (default: false)

tools.name: mfr_generate_report
tools.description: Generate a PDF report for a service request using a report definition. Returns a hash/URL to download the generated report.

reportDefinitionId.description: The report definition ID to use for generation
